steps.title: Identify what the example must show
steps.content: The claim is that elevation and prominence can differ significantly. The example needs a single mountain with both values shown so the reader can see the gap between them.

steps.title: Match the data
steps.content:
(D) gives Nanda Devi's elevation as $7{,}816$ m and prominence of only $3{,}139$ m — a gap of more than $4{,}600$ m, exactly the kind of large difference the claim describes.

(A) gives only elevation. (B) and (C) compare different mountains, not elevation vs. prominence on one mountain.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
